steps.title: Identify what 'beginning a narrative' requires
steps.content: The goal is to begin a narrative about Merle Oberon's life. A narrative opening must establish the protagonist's biographical origin—where and when the story starts—not jump ahead to achievements or specific episodes.

steps.title: Apply the narrative opening principle to the choices
steps.content: Choice A provides her birthplace (Mumbai, then Bombay) and birth year (1911), establishing the biographical starting point where her narrative should begin. The other three jump ahead to achievements and films (B), isolate a single episode (C), or sketch a career pattern (D) without establishing a narrative opening. That matches choice A — A is correct.
